name: qa-mobile-tests-automation
description: Suite de testes automatizados mobile (Android/iOS) com Appium e WebdriverIO — Youse Seguradora

scripts.test:smoke:android: cross-env PLATFORM=android SPECS=./tests/spec/smoke/**/*.spec.ts wdio run wdio.conf.ts
scripts.test:smoke:android:external: cross-env PLATFORM=android APPIUM_EXTERNAL=true SPECS=./tests/spec/smoke/**/*.spec.ts wdio run wdio.conf.ts
scripts.test:smoke:ios: cross-env PLATFORM=ios SPECS=./tests/spec/smoke/**/*.spec.ts wdio run wdio.conf.ts
scripts.test:e2e:android: cross-env PLATFORM=android TIMEOUT=900000 SPECS=./tests/spec/e2e/**/*.spec.ts wdio run wdio.conf.ts
scripts.test:e2e:ios: cross-env PLATFORM=ios SPECS=./tests/spec/e2e/**/*.spec.ts wdio run wdio.conf.ts
scripts.test:a11y:android: cross-env PLATFORM=android SPECS=./tests/spec/a11y/**/*.spec.ts wdio run wdio.conf.ts
scripts.test:a11y:smoke:android: cross-env PLATFORM=android SPECS=./tests/spec/a11y/home.a11y.spec.ts wdio run wdio.conf.ts
scripts.test:a11y:ios: cross-env PLATFORM=ios SPECS=./tests/spec/a11y/**/*.spec.ts wdio run wdio.conf.ts
scripts.test:a11y:smoke:ios: cross-env PLATFORM=ios SPECS=./tests/spec/a11y/home.a11y.spec.ts wdio run wdio.conf.ts
scripts.test:a11y:report:android: cross-env PLATFORM=android SPECS=./tests/spec/a11y/**/*.spec.ts wdio run wdio.conf.ts && npm run mobile:a11y:report
scripts.appium:doctor: appium driver doctor uiautomator2 && appium driver doctor xcuitest
scripts.validate: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run format:check
scripts.qa:check: npm run validate && npm run qa:precommit
